code:
import io
import string
import list

let line = io.read_line()
let text = match line
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
mut sorted = true
mut prev = 0
mut first = true
mut i = 0
let n = tokens.len()
while i < n
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  let cur = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if first
    first = false
    prev = cur
  else
    if cur < prev
      sorted = false
    end
    prev = cur
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
